name: flowvision
description: 一键分析项目流程图 · 可视化编辑 · AI 生成 · MCP 服务器同步

scripts.build:desktop: turbo run build --filter=@flowvision/frontend --filter=@flowvision/backend && pnpm --filter @flowvision/backend build:bundle && pnpm --filter @flowvision/desktop build
scripts.test:run: pnpm --filter @flowvision/analyzer exec vitest run && pnpm --filter @flowvision/backend exec vitest run && pnpm --filter @flowvision/frontend exec vitest run && pnpm --filter @flowvision/desktop test
